scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w @mirror-ai/api" "npm run dev -w @mirror-ai/worker" "npm run dev -w @mirror-ai/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @mirror-ai/shared && npm run build -w @mirror-ai/api && npm run build -w @mirror-ai/worker && npm run build -w @mirror-ai/web
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start -w @mirror-ai/api" "npm run start -w @mirror-ai/worker" "npm run preview -w @mirror-ai/web"
